text: There is a spirit of curiosity and anticipation in this place. The transparent glass doors create a sense of openness, yet the high ceilings and minimalist decor make me feel small and slightly hesitant as I step inside. The bold "R+D" display energizes me with its vibrant colors and crisp text, suggesting that exploration and experimentation are welcome here. I am mindful of my place within this carefully constructed environment—alert, inquisitive, and ready to engage with the ideas being presented.
